---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today? Describe the need, not just a solution.

## Proposed change

What you'd like 3Powers to do. Since 3Powers is spec-driven, note whether this is a new **requirement**
(new intended behavior) or an improvement to how an existing requirement is met.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Scope & fit

- Which part does this touch? <oracle | gate suite | trust spine | lifecycle/orchestration | adapters |
  docs | other>
- Is it a new **language adapter**? If so, see [`.3powers/adapters/CONTRACT.md`](../../.3powers/adapters/CONTRACT.md).
- Would it change the spec or the trust model? (Those start as a discussion — see
  [GOVERNANCE.md](../../GOVERNANCE.md).)

## Anything else

Links, prior art, or context.
